entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS THIS EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLEAR AFTER MIDNIGHT
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY BE SEVERE WITH DAMAGING WINDS AND LARGE HAIL
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 60
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 40S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
